steps: File formal tax reclaim with ATO for AU000000BHP4 dividend citing AU-NO treaty 15% rate vs 25% withheld
Submit W-8BEN-E and Norwegian tax residency certificate to Citigroup Australia for account 1301234567
Request Citigroup Australia process treaty rate adjustment for BHP dividend to recover AUD 138,750.00
Follow up with Skatteetaten for confirmation of Norwegian resident status if additional documentation required

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
